name: MulHiggins Indoor Golf
about: MulHiggins Indoor Golf is a one-bay indoor golf simulator venue located in Natick, MA. It is designed to serve lessons, accommodate foursome play, and host individual practice sessions. The venue provides an accessible, low-cost opportunity for golfers of all skill levels to work on their game during the colder months. It is designed for lessons, foursome play, or individual practice sessions with a focus on accessibility and affordability.
why_golfers_like_it: Affordable pricing for all skill levels
Versatile for both lessons and group play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service or bar on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The information does not specify, but it is standard practice for players to bring their own clubs to indoor golf simulator venues.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention any on-site food or beverage service, suggesting players may be permitted to bring their own.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round typically take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round is not specified, but as a single-bay venue focused on practice and smaller groups, times are likely flexible and shorter than a traditional course.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-oriented and designed for all levels of golfers, including juniors, making it a kid-friendly environment.
